title: JulesAlias
description: A stable alias mapping a human-readable name to a Jules session ID (agency/capabilities/jules/_main.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — prompt-dossier+doc+jules wave). Recorded by jules.alias and looked up by jules.resume to reconnect to a named session without exposing raw SIDs.

name.description: Human-readable alias name, e.g. 'my-feature-session'. Unique per graph.

sid.description: Jules session ID this alias resolves to.
